raw_consumer_statement: On or about XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX, someone unknown to me started using my card for a multitude of services and products I did not buy myself from a number of places where I have never been or used the card. I received a phone call on or about XX/XX/XXXX from the XXXX XXXX XXXX of XXXX asking me if I had made a number of suspect purchases. I told the person that I had not made any of the charges that she had listed. She said she would proceed with an investigation and also I had the card cancelled at that time with a new card to be issued some time later. I talked to her XXXX - 5 days later and she indicated that there were numerous more charges of a suspicious nature. Some days later, I received a notice from XXXX ( attached with the false billing ) that the investigation was complete and that I was responsible for the charges of {$350.00} because the card was in my possession at the time of the false charges. After receiving this letter, I permanently cancelled my account with XXXX. I do not believe I can be held responsible for somebody using the number to plainly purchase items and services that I would never purchase myself. I had a similar situation a number of years back with XXXX XXXX in which items and services were purchased in places I have never been and never used that card. After their investigation, XXXX XXXX determined that I was not responsible for any of the charges in question. Here we have a credit card company that is very slow to react to criminal activity from the XXXX of XXXX on. Citicard did not protect my security and now wants me to pay for its failure to provide that security. I have covered the cost of the bill that they sent, writing an accompanying letter that it is paid under protest and demanding the return of the {$350.00} that they allege I owe. In that letter, I stated that I was responsible for XXXX charge in the bill, i.e., a charge of {$260.00} at XXXX XXXX in XXXX IL. I will send the list of charges, my letter and their response if I can upload them all within your system 's capacity. Thank you for your attention to this matter.
